title: Air-Fried Mediterannean Yogurt Crumble
description: A sour and creamy mediterranean dish featuring stale bread crumbled with yogurt for a midnight-craving treat that's sugar-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Optional: Lemon Juice or Vinaigrette for Topping

instructions: Toast stale bread until lightly golden, then crumble into small pieces.
Stir in fresh herbs and a little lemon juice or vinaigrette if desired.
Fold the yogurt mixture gently over the crumbs using a fork or your hands to mix well without breaking up too much of the bread pieces.
Transfer the mixture evenly onto an air fryer tray lined with parchment paper for non-stick cooking.
Air-fry for about 8-10 minutes, shaking halfway through until golden and crispy. Watch closely as it can easily burn.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving. Enjoy its sour and creamy mediterranean flavor.
